description_long: A male adult figure is depicted in a dynamic, combat-ready pose, with one arm extended and the other gripping a long, thin sword. He wears medieval-inspired attire, including a short-sleeved tunic with a tattered hem, fitted pants, and sturdy shoes. His upper body is protected by dark, rounded pauldrons and a chest harness, while his forearms are wrapped in fabric or leather bracers. A thick scarf is wrapped around his neck, partially covering his lower face, and a pouch is strapped to his belt. His hair is styled short on the sides with a longer, textured top, and his facial features are sharp and alert. The overall appearance suggests a streetwise or rogue-like character, ready for action in an urban or fantasy setting.
description: A male adult in medieval-inspired combat attire, wielding a sword and wearing armor, stands in a dynamic, action-ready pose. He features a scarf, bracers, and a pouch, with short, styled hair and a focused expression.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from the front left, highlighting his extended arm, sword, and facial features, with the scarf and chest armor clearly visible.
description_view_1: Viewed from the rear left, the back of the head, scarf, and the length of the sword are prominent, with the back armor and leg stance in focus.
description_view_2: A direct rear view shows the crossed straps of the chest harness, the back of the tunic, and the wide stance of the legs.
description_view_3: The front right view emphasizes the sword arm, side profile of the face, and the pouch on the belt, with the armor and bracers visible.
attribute_clothing_type: medieval-style tunic, fitted pants, shoulder armor, scarf, bracers, and belt pouch
attribute_posture: dynamic combat stance with legs apart and arms extended
attribute_hairstyle: short sides with a longer, textured top
